login.title: MiniNook
login.subtitle: Connect to your Miniflux server to get started.
login.switchToBasic: Local setup without OIDC? Use login + password
login.errorMissingUrl: Please enter the server URL first.

1.title: Create your first category
1.body: Categories help you organize feeds by topic. Pick a name and click "Create".

2.title: Add your first feed
2.body: Paste the URL of a site (or its RSS feed). You'll be asked which category. You can also pick from Suggestions.

3.title: Here are your feeds
3.body: Your latest unread articles show up here, newest first. Scrolling auto-loads more.

4.title: Read an article
4.body: Click a card to open it. On the reader page, the ✓ icon marks it as read.

5.title: React on articles
5.body: The bookmark button to save it to My list, ✕ to discard it. Discarded items move out of your feed.

6.title: Filter by category
6.body: The bottom bar lets you focus on a topic. Click a category to filter.

7.title: Refine your filters
7.body: The eye toggles already-read articles, the paywall badge hides paid ones, and the dedup icon groups cross-feed duplicates.

8.title: Quick search
8.body: Press ⌘K (or click the magnifier) to search through your articles. Arrows navigate, Enter opens.

9.title: Manage feeds and categories
9.body: "My feeds" lists everything, lets you drag-and-drop between categories, add or remove. "Manage categories" for full CRUD.

10.title: Read when you feel like it
10.body: Articles you bookmark land in "My list" — pick them back up at your own pace.

11.title: Keep your feed clean
11.body: "Discarded" shows a per-feed chart: spot the noisy sources, unsubscribe in one click.

12.title: Your settings
12.body: Language, account, sign out: everything is here. You can switch the interface language on the fly.

13.title: You're set!
13.body: You know the essentials. Happy reading!

settings.title: Settings
settings.disconnectHint: You'll go back to the login screen.
